about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm passionate about building systems that truly work — stable, high-performing, and designed to scale. I work daily with Java and Spring Boot, developing robust solutions that support business needs and deliver real value.
about.expertise: My strongest expertise lies in integrations and event-driven architecture. I enjoy transforming complex systems into simple, reliable, and observable flows.
about.focus: In recent months, I've been expanding my expertise into Cloud and Infrastructure as Code, focusing on AWS, Terraform, and observability.
about.mindset: I'm driven by challenges, continuous learning, and the desire to deliver solutions that truly make a difference — both for users and for the team.
